name: sync-gbrain
tagline: Keeps gbrain current with repo code and refreshes agent search guidance in CLAUDE.md.
verdict: This skill manages gbrain synchronization, including code indexing and call graph generation. It handles various configurations and provides detailed feedback. It includes robust error handling and clear instructions for users to resolve issues. The skill also incorporates telemetry and user preference settings, ensuring a comprehensive and adaptable workflo

highlights.summary: SKILL.md is 1000+ lines, exceeding the recommended budget for inline content.
SKILL.md is 1000+ lines, exceeding the recommended budget of ~500 lines.
